threats: Heal-stacking: Phase. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Zinx) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
ourKits.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
ourKits.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
ourKits.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal

ourKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
ourKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
ourKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
ourKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
ourKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
ourKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
ourKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

ourKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
ourKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

enemyKits.combo: Rushing Beat dashes → Line Tempo wolves → Circle Rhythm shield → All-Kill! wolfpack ult
enemyKits.winCondition: stack Track and unleash All-Kill! in a grouped fight
enemyKits.playAgainst: spread vs the wolfpack; she's squishy without her shield up

enemyKits.combo: Mark a target → Hive slow → Swarm reposition → Curse execute-burst ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Mark + Curse a squishy and delete them with %max-HP Pestilence
enemyKits.playWith: setup that holds her marked target
enemyKits.playAgainst: she's squishy with one escape (Swarm) — dive after it's used; spread vs Hive

enemyKits.combo: Mercy poke → stack Vengeance → Shadow Glide reposition → Purge ult
enemyKits.winCondition: stack Vengeance and shred with the channeled Purge
enemyKits.playWith: peel so she can channel Purge safely
enemyKits.playAgainst: interrupt/CC her during Purge; punish her short dash cooldown

enemyKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
enemyKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
enemyKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
enemyKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
enemyKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

enemyKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
enemyKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
enemyKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
